$schema: Principals = nodes of the trust hypergraph. class in {substrate, human, defense, broker, conduit}. era_introduced = year the trust surface became real. maturity in {mature, emerging, frontier}. This set is a SEED and is expandable; adding a node auto-spawns frontier gap edges (see gap-engine auto-spawn rule).

principals.name: Host / Endpoint
principals.note: OS, processes, local memory, peripherals.

principals.name: Active Directory
principals.note: Domain trust, Kerberos, AD CS, delegation.

principals.name: Network
principals.note: L2-L7 transit, proxies, egress, transit trust.

principals.name: Cloud Control Plane
principals.note: AWS/Azure/GCP IAM, metadata, control APIs.

principals.name: Container / K8s
principals.note: Image, runtime, orchestrator, ServiceAccount.

principals.name: Supply Chain / Build
principals.note: Registries, CI/CD, dependencies, artifacts.

principals.name: Identity & Federation
principals.note: Entra/SAML/OAuth/OIDC. A full peer node: it bridges trust across every other substrate, not a leaf.

principals.name: AI Agent
principals.note: LLM-driven autonomous actor. A parser with no grammar.

principals.name: MCP / Tool-Broker
principals.note: Holds creds to N backends; selects tools from model output. Confused deputy by construction.

principals.name: Vector Store / RAG Index
principals.note: Write-side open (ingestion), read-side privileged (query-time injection into context).

principals.name: Agent Long-Term Memory
principals.note: Write-once, trigger-many, cross-session. The agent polls its own state.

principals.name: Human Operator / User
principals.note: The principal whose scope and judgment the agent borrows.

principals.name: SOC / Defense
principals.note: Detection stack, increasingly ML/LLM. A parser pointed at telemetry.

principals.name: Document / File
principals.note: Text-ingress conduit: any file is potential control for an LLM.

principals.name: Web / Fetch
principals.note: Untrusted read surface; fetch/browse ingress.

principals.name: Email / Messaging
principals.note: Delivery + text-ingress conduit.

principals.name: OT / ICS / SCADA
principals.note: PLCs, engineering workstations, field buses (Modbus/DNP3/S7). Insecure-by-design; safety-critical.

principals.name: Mobile (iOS / Android)
principals.note: Apps, MDM/profiles, IPC/intents, mobile session tokens.

principals.name: Hardware / IoT / Firmware
principals.note: Firmware, secure boot, debug interfaces (JTAG/UART), side channels.

principals.name: Automotive / CAN
principals.note: CAN bus, ECUs, key fobs (PKES), telematics/OTA.

principals.name: Wireless / RF
principals.note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth/BLE, RFID/NFC, SDR-reachable RF medium.
